_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to accurately and completely source all data used in intelligence, assessment and/or planning products.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organization, recognizing potential across diverse backgrounds and building leadership pipelines that strengthen organizational capability.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.594), AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.593).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.577). Shared vocabulary: [ability, data]. DCWF-only terms [accurately, assessment, completely, intelligence, planning, products] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability, develop] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.853, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (52.7%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Ability to accurately and completely source all data used in intelligence, asses" and "Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organiz". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.602 ≈ STS 0.577 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [ability, data]. DCWF-only: [accurately, assessment, completely, intelligence, planning, products]. WIDAI-only: [across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability, develop].
